dataset.note: averageRating and numVotes define the target and are intentionally excluded from the predictors to avoid target leakage.

best_model.why_best_model_won: Random Forest (Tuned) performed best because it balanced precision and recall most effectively (F1=0.233) while maintaining strong ROC-AUC (0.7956). Its top features also align with the observed data patterns in release timing, title format, and genre composition.
